method: LD-203 contribution items whose honoree resolves to Sen. Tammy Baldwin (B001230), filtered to drugmaker/industry registrants or contributors; press releases from the corpus keyword-matched for pharma/drug-price topics (title + first 1,500 chars).

takeda_nord_payments.honoree: Sen. Tammy Baldwin: WI US Senate

takeda_nord_payments.payee: THE NATIONAL ORGANIZATION FOR RARE DISORDERS, INC

notes: $168,500 vs the doc's $167,500: a ~$1,000 difference from which small items are counted as pharma-industry; both Takeda $80,000 payments to NORD reproduce with filing UUIDs.

48 pharma-RELATED releases (keyword match) in period A vs the doc's 37 CRITICAL releases (a stricter human judgment); period B: 192 total releases (exact match) with 0-1 pharma mentions and none critical.
Both press releases and LD-203 filings are self-reported; timing pattern, not causation.
